goal: 让 Catty dogfood health sampleGate 暴露上次采样时间

summary.title: 暴露 health sampleGate 采样时间
summary.what: 在 Catty dogfood-health 的只读 sampleGate 输出中透传 latestPredictionAt，并用 repeated-context 测试和 README 说明锁定该字段。
summary.why: 当前 dogfood 被 repeated-context 阻塞时，长期推进 agent 需要直接从机器可读 gate 判断上次采样锚点，避免跨 samplingFreshness 字段拼接后误判是否该写 Pi sample。
summary.user_goal: 让 Catty dogfood health sampleGate 暴露上次采样时间

decisions.chose: 把 latestPredictionAt 直接放进 sampleGate，并继续保留 samplingFreshness 的完整诊断。
decisions.rationale: sampleGate 是长期推进 agent 的写入闸门，直接带上上次采样时间能降低 repeated-context 状态下的误操作风险。
rejected: 只依赖 samplingFreshness.latestPredictionAt，让调用方自行跨字段拼接

decisions.chose: 只做只读字段透传，不改变 repeated-context 拒绝写入、不调用模型、不写 user memory。
decisions.rationale: 当前 live health 仍要求等待真实 context switch；本切片只改善诊断能力。

review_notes: 本轮 scoped commit 为 90ae7b7，实际改动文件只有 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts、src/catty/dogfood-health.ts；seal prepare 的大范围 diff 是 catty 分支相对 main 的历史累积。
历史 proposed overlap 属于同一 catty 分支上的顺序 dogfood-health/readiness 切片，本改动与既有写入边界不冲突。
CLAUDE.md 是无关 dirty，未 stage、未 commit；本次 seal 使用 --allow-dirty 保留该边界。
验证：bun test src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts；bun test src/catty/*.test.ts；bun test；git diff --check；live sampleGate smoke 输出 latestPredictionAt=2026-05-26T21:49:59.336Z。
runtime live probe ok；launchd lastExitCode 仍有一次 locked skip 残留 warning，stderr 为空，heartbeat.out.log 最近多次 ok。

architectural_claims: dogfood-health remains a dry-run/read-only readiness surface
sampleGate is the machine-readable write boundary for long-running Catty agents
behavioral_changes: Repeated-context sampleGate results now include latestPredictionAt alongside latestPredictionId and boundaryKind
Ready-for-Pi sampleGate results also expose the previous latestPredictionAt when available
security_implications: No secrets read or printed; no user memory writes; no model calls added
